shortDescription.zh: 亮底香檳金商務風，沉穩、雜誌感、適合提案與高階簡報。
shortDescription.en: Refined champagne-gold business theme for proposals, executive decks, and reports.

shortDescription.zh: 冷白底科技青，資訊感清楚、適合產品說明、AI 工具與資料簡報。
shortDescription.en: Bright, modern tech theme with glacier whites and restrained cyan accents.

shortDescription.zh: 人文襯線與暖白背景，安靜、克制、偏 editorial 的閱讀型主題。
shortDescription.en: A restrained editorial theme with warm whites, soft shadows, and humanist serif accents.

shortDescription.zh: Claude 調性延伸的奶油米與磚橘，帶品牌溫度、適合故事與教學型報告。
shortDescription.en: Claude-inspired cream and brick palette with stronger brand warmth and softer hospitality.
